parameters.subject: TAS N8N: Workflow Organisation Report — {{ $json.totalWorkflows }} workflows in {{ $json.totalFolders }} folders
parameters.message:
=

Workflow Organisation Report

Logical folders: {{ $json.totalFolders }}

{{ $json.folders.map(f => '

' + f.folder + ' (' + f.count + ')

    ' + f.workflows.map(w => '
  • ' + (w.active ? '✅' : '❌') + ' ' + w.name + ' [' + w.tags.join(', ') + ']
    • ').join('') + '
').join('') }}

Use these folder groupings to organise workflows in N8N manually, or create actual N8N folders matching these names.
